message:
test(frankenpandas): add expression-driven analysis integration test (br-oyhpp / fd90.157)

fd90.157: continuing the README → integration-test coverage pattern
from fd90.146 / fd90.156. The README's 'Expression-Driven Analysis'
example (lines 1403-1417) wasn't exercised by any integration test.
DataFrameExprExt was in the prelude (verified by fd90.155's compile
guard) but no test exercised the documented eval / query /
query_with_locals chain end-to-end via prelude::*.

Fix: add 'readme_expression_driven_analysis_compiles_and_runs' which
mirrors the README example. Constructs a 3-row DataFrame with
revenue/cost/price/rating/value columns and verifies:
  - df.eval('revenue - cost')? returns a Series of length 3
  - df.query('price < 50 and rating > 4.0')? returns 2 rows
    (rows 0 and 2 satisfy both conditions; row 1 fails rating>4.0)
  - df.query_with_locals('value > @threshold', &locals)? with
    BTreeMap<String, Scalar> locals returns 2 rows
    (rows with value>100; row 1's value=80 drops)

Verified:
- cargo test -p frankenpandas — 7 lib + 4 integration + 2 doctests
  all pass

Pure additive test. No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
